summary: Iteration 67: CEO Dashboard API Endpoints Testing Complete. All 16 tests pass. Verified all CEO endpoints return proper metrics and charts objects, including the NEW /api/ceo/cash-flow endpoint with burn_rate, runway_months, profit_margin. CEO endpoints correctly return 403 for non-CEO users.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All CEO endpoints verified. Response middleware wraps all responses in {data: {...}, success: bool, error: ...} envelope. CEO endpoints require CEO role via require_ceo dependency (returns 403 otherwise). The NEW cash-flow endpoint returns burn_rate, runway_months, profit_margin as documented.

features_tested.4. CEO 403 access control: PASS - Regular user gets 403 on /api/ceo/* endpoints
features_tested.5. GET /api/ceo/overview-metrics: PASS - returns metrics (mrr, net_new_mrr, active_customers, churn_rate, arpu, ltv, cac, arr) + charts (mrr_trend, customer_trend, revenue_breakdown)
features_tested.6. GET /api/ceo/health: PASS - returns kpis (mrr, gross_revenue, net_profit, active_companies, active_venues, churn_rate)
features_tested.7. GET /api/ceo/revenue-detailed: PASS - returns metrics (mrr, expansion_mrr, contraction_mrr, churned_mrr, net_new_mrr, arr, net_cash_flow) + charts (daily_revenue, monthly_mrr, cash_flow)
features_tested.8. GET /api/ceo/cash-flow (NEW): PASS - returns metrics (gross_revenue, operating_costs, net_cash_flow, burn_rate, runway_months, mrr, arr, profit_margin) + charts (monthly_flow, mrr_evolution, cumulative_cash)
features_tested.9. GET /api/ceo/revenue?period=month: PASS - returns chart array with revenue/profit/fees
features_tested.13. GET /api/ceo/marketing-funnel: PASS - returns metrics (total_leads, lead_to_trial, trial_to_paid) + charts (funnel, sources, monthly_leads)
features_tested.14. GET /api/ceo/customer-lifecycle: PASS - returns metrics (total_customers, new_this_month, retention_rate, rev_per_customer) + charts (customer_growth, rev_per_customer)
features_tested.15. GET /api/ceo/growth-metrics: PASS - returns metrics (ltv, cac, ltv_cac_ratio, payback_months) + charts
features_tested.16. GET /api/ceo/risk-dashboard: PASS - returns metrics (total_incidents, risk_score) + alerts + severity_breakdown
